            - /url: "#"
            - heading "Why choose cloud-based HR software?" [level=5] [ref=e377]
            - img [ref=e380]
          - heading "Cloud-based HR software ensures the security and accessibility of information and systems, no matter where people are located. With many companies implementing flexible or remote work environments, relying on paper workflows or locally stored HR files or software can cause issues with both security of data and information, and also accessibility to staff who need access to information. ‍ Swingvy’s cloud-based HR software brings people together, no matter where they are. With a company news feed and shared company calendar, everyone is kept up to date on events, holidays, and company announcements. Company information, an organisation chart, and an employee directory are accessible to your team at any time, along with secure access to personal HR details, e-payslips, benefits allowance, leave balance, and leave and expense claim requests." [level=5] [ref=e385]:
            - text: Cloud-based HR software ensures the security and accessibility of information and systems, no matter where people are located. With a company news feed and shared company calendar, everyone is kept up to date on events, holidays, and company announcements.             - img [ref=e392]
          - heading "Swingvy’s HR and payroll software caters to small to medium businesses, from 2 to 100 employees, across a wide range of industries. If your company has more than 100 employees, get in touch with our team for a free customised evaluation of the HR software needs of your business. ‍ Swingvy HR software including an HR Hub, Leave Management System, Expense Claims Management System and more can be used by all companies, while our Payroll Software has been specifically designed for companies in Singapore, Malaysia, and Taiwan, to cater to local statutory tax and payroll regulations." [level=5] [ref=e397]:
            - text: Swingvy’s HR and payroll software caters to small to medium businesses, from 2 to 100 employees, across a wide range of industries. If your company has more than 100 employees, get in touch with our team for a free customised evaluation of the HR software needs of your business.
            - text: ‍
            - text: Swingvy HR software including an HR Hub, Leave Management System, Expense Claims Management System and more can be used by all companies, while our Payroll Software has been specifically designed for companies in Singapore, Malaysia, and Taiwan, to cater to local statutory tax and payroll regulations.

            - heading "Who in a company can use Swingvy's HR software?" [level=5] [ref=e401]
            - img [ref=e404]
          - heading "Swingvy caters to all employees in a company, from business owners and HR administrators to employees. Administrators of the software have secure access to an admin area to set up and manage employee profiles and business settings, and run payroll.             - heading "How secure is the Swingvy HR software?" [level=5] [ref=e415]
            - img [ref=e418]
          - heading "Swingvy HR software is cloud-based with secure logins for administrators and individual employees.           - heading "After signing up with Swingvy, companies receive a complimentary account setup guide, with a dedicated in-house consultant available to you for 30 days to ensure a successful account setup. ‍ A dedicated Success Manager will also work as a primary contact to answer your questions or solve any issues you may be having using the HR software after the onboarding period.
